name: Myure
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 223; Episode 146

Myure is a member of the Bellamy Pirates. She is the doctor of the crew and is the curvy female with the hair tied up in a cute bun wearing a tight-fitting yellow outfit and crosses decorated on her boots. She has almost no interactions with the crew, however when Nami refused Bellamy's offer to buy her off the Straw Hat Pirates, she had been the first to laugh at her response. Being the crews physician, she presumably made the bandage around Bellamy's head that was seen when Donquixote Doflamingo came to Jaya to punish him. It is unknown how advanced her medical skills are.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
